title: Summer Resort Travel Ad Poster AI
sourceTitle: Summer Resort Travel Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 4:5 summer seaside resort travel poster for white parasol and wooden lounge chair beside gentle blue waves, with headline 有些风景，值得你停下来。 and subtitle ESCAPE TO THE SEA. Subject: white parasol and wooden lounge chair beside gentle blue waves becomes the aspirational travel hero scene, built around waves, sand, white parasol, wooden lounge chairs, sunlit sea surface, and a calm luxury-vacation feeling. Scene: Bright beach resort advertising environment with comfortable white title space at the top, activity or detail space at the bottom, ocean breeze, clean sunlight, and relaxed freedom. Composition: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Signature Elements: white parasol and wooden lounge chair beside gentle blue waves, waves hitting sand, white parasol, wooden chair, sunlight on water, ocean-blue white sand palette, upper title space, lower information space, 有些风景，值得你停下来。, and ESCAPE TO THE SEA. Style: Luxury resort branding, summer vacation aesthetic, commercial travel advertising poster, refreshing cinematic photography, refined tourism design, and premium serif typography. Color Palette: Ocean blue, pure white, pale sand, sunlit cream, soft sky cyan, and restrained warm-gold highlights. Lighting: Bright summer sunlight on the sea surface, clean airy shadows under the umbrella and chair, gentle sparkle on waves, and warm vacation atmosphere. Camera: Wide relaxed resort-photography view with readable beach furniture, open sea depth, and balanced negative space for poster typography. Typography: 有些风景，值得你停下来。 appears as the elegant Chinese travel headline; ESCAPE TO THE SEA appears as the refined resort subtitle in high-end Serif style, both readable and clean. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
